title: FastCrops
description: Harvest crops by just right-clicking, like in mod packs.
body:
## Commands
`/fastcrops reload` - config reload

## Permissions
`fastcrops.admin` - `/fastcrops` command

## Configuration 
``` YAML
lootBonus: true
ignoreClickCancel: false
awardAdvancement: true
sound:
  enabled: true
  name: "block.crop.break"
hand:
  - &hoes
  - AIR
```
lootBonus - will the luck enchantment count\
ignoreClickCancel - will canceling a click by other plugins be ignored\
awardAdvancement - gives a "A Seedy Place" achievement when harvesting\
sound - plays a sound to player when harvesting\
hand - defines a types of items, which can be used to harvest
